text: Here, I am enveloped by an atmosphere of intellect and innovation. The glass-walled room buzzing with quiet discussion and the display celebrating research and development evoke in me a sense of both curiosity and reverence. I feel a keen excitement—here, it seems, minds meet to question and reimagine the future. Yet I am also humbled by the sheer complexity and ambition on display; it is a reminder of my small but vital part in the ever-unfolding tapestry of human inquiry.
